tools.name: search_docs
tools.description: Search MetaMask Embedded Wallets documentation (Algolia) and example projects. Returns doc page links with snippets and matching examples.

tools.name: get_doc
tools.description: Fetch the full content of a MetaMask Embedded Wallets documentation page by URL. Sources: Algolia, llms.txt, GitHub MDX.

tools.name: get_example
tools.description: Fetch complete source code of a Web3Auth integration example from GitHub.

tools.name: get_sdk_reference
tools.description: Fetch SDK source code (types, interfaces, hooks) from open-source Web3Auth repos.

tools.name: search_community
tools.description: Search or fetch posts from the MetaMask Embedded Wallets community forum (builder.metamask.io).
